mechanism_narrative: A sustained 3-month decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in the unemployment rate below 3.5% signals tightening labor market conditions that boost corporate profit expectations, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where UNRATE falls below 3.5%.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in industrial production (INDPRO) and housing starts (HOUST) indicates expanding supply-side capacity that supports corporate earnings, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Both INDPRO and HOUST rise but SPX produces negative 20d returns in 50%+ of cases.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in the federal funds rate above 4.5% signals monetary tightening that raises equity discount rates, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where FEDFUNDS exceeds 4.5%.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly GDP growth (GDPC1) above 2% signals strong aggregate demand that boosts corporate revenues, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60d returns despite GDPC1 growth above 2% in 50%+ of cases.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in payrolls (PAYEMS) above 150k signals robust labor market conditions that support consumer spending, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in 60%+ of instances where PAYEMS exceeds 150k.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in the federal funds rate (FEDFUNDS) and inflation (CPIAUCSL) indicate accommodative monetary policy and disinflation, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Both FEDFUNDS and CPIAUCSL decline but SPX produces negative 20d returns in 50%+ of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production (INDPRO) above its 3-month moving average indicates expanding supply-side capacity that supports corporate earnings, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns despite INDPRO rising above its 3-month MA in 50%+ of cases.
